## Findings
- [x] **[BLOCK][Docs] Agent integration guide's MCP tool table missing all 4 entity tools** — *resolved in this run*
  - **Status quo (at detection):** `docs/agent-integration.md:88-94` ("Available MCP Tools" table) documented only `memory_get`, `memory_set`, `memory_search`, `memory_list`. No row existed for `entity_list`, `entity_resolve`, `entity_relate`, or `graph_neighbors` — so the new `entity_resolve` tool shipped in this release, and `entity_relate`'s new ID-based/provenance arguments (`from_id`, `to_id`, `source`, `source_ref`, `verification`, `evidence`) added in PR #345, had no reference-table entry at all.
  - **Likely cause:** The table was last updated for the `profile` parameter on `memory_search` (PR #342) but was never extended when `entity_relate`/`graph_neighbors` first shipped, and `entity_resolve` in this release compounded the same gap.
  - **Resolution:** Added table rows for `entity_list`, `entity_resolve`, `entity_relate` (full current argument set incl. provenance fields), and `graph_neighbors` to `docs/agent-integration.md`, matching the tool descriptions in `internal/mcp/mcp_tools.go`. Applied directly in this run at explicit user instruction (not part of this skill's default mechanical-only auto-fix scope).

## Applied fixes (this run)
Mechanical (version strings, default auto-fix scope):
- `docs/openapi.yaml:8` `version: 0.12.0` → `version: 0.13.0`
- `docs/openapi.yaml:30` `example: 0.12.0` → `example: 0.13.0`
- `docs/agent-integration.md:110` response example `"version":"0.12.0"` → `"version":"0.13.0"`

Substantial (doc content, applied by explicit user choice — see Findings):
- `docs/agent-integration.md`: added `entity_list`, `entity_resolve`, `entity_relate`, `graph_neighbors` rows to the "Available MCP Tools" table.

None of the above edits are committed or pushed — they remain in the working tree to ride into `07-gh-release`'s release commit.
